title: Tomato Sambal
excerpt: Ingredients 2 medium-sized tomatoes, cut into small cubes ½ cucumber, halved lengthways, seeds scraped out and cut into small cubes 1 small onion, cut into small cubes a handful of parsley, finely chopped vinegar, salt, white pepper and sugar to taste optional: chopped fresh chilli and coriander leaves to taste Method Mix …
html:
Ingredients

  • 2 medium-sized tomatoes, cut into small cubes
  • ½ cucumber, halved lengthways, seeds scraped out and cut into small cubes
  • 1 small onion, cut into small cubes
  • a handful of parsley, finely chopped
  • vinegar, salt, white pepper and sugar to taste
  • optional: chopped fresh chilli and coriander leaves to taste

Method

Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl, cover and place in the fridge for at least an hour before serving.

Makes 300 – 600 ml sambal.

Easy!
